description_long: This is a round, medium-sized orange fruit with a slightly flattened top and bottom, featuring a textured, dimpled peel characteristic of Citrus sinensis. The surface is predominantly a vibrant orange color, with subtle variations in hue and a few minor blemishes or marks visible on the skin. The top of the fruit displays a small, circular stem remnant, while the rest of the surface is uninterrupted and smooth. The peel appears thick and slightly glossy, with a tactile roughness typical of oranges. The overall shape is nearly spherical, with a gentle asymmetry that gives it a natural, organic appearance. This fruit would commonly be found in urban environments as part of street markets, grocery displays, or discarded as litter.
description: A round, dimpled orange fruit with a slightly glossy, textured peel and a small stem remnant on top. The surface shows natural color variation and minor blemishes.
description_view_0: This view highlights the top of the orange with the stem remnant and a visible blemish on the left side.
description_view_1: This view shows a smoother, uninterrupted orange surface with the stem remnant centered and no major blemishes.
description_view_2: This view presents a nearly flawless, evenly colored orange surface with the stem remnant barely visible.
description_view_3: This view displays a small dark spot near the bottom right and a generally smooth, orange surface with the stem remnant at the top.
attribute_location_or_placement: street market stall, grocery store produce section, park bench, sidewalk
